name: Lamb w/ Yoghurt, Coconut Milk & Almond Masala (Badami Gosht
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl or cup, drop the saffron threads and add 1/3 of the boiling water. Soak for at least 10 minutes.
2. Pour the soaked saffron and its liquid into a deep bowl. Stir in the yoghurt, caraway seeds, and salt.
3. Add the lamb and mix well until all pieces are evenly coated. Marinate at room temperature for about 30 minutes.
4. In another bowl, combine almonds and the remaining boiling water. Soak for 10 minutes.
5. Blend the almonds with their soaking water until smooth. Set aside.
6. Heat ghee in a heavy casserole over moderate heat until hot.
7. Add cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves. Stir for a minute or so.
8. Add onions, garlic, and ginger. Fry, lifting and turning constantly, until soft and golden brown (7-8 minutes).
9. Remove lamb with a slotted spoon and add to the casserole. Stir until it browns evenly.
10. Stir in the marinade, cold water, almond puree, and red pepper. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Pour in coconut milk and bring to a boil. Simmer partially covered for 20 minutes or until lamb is tender.
12. To serve, discard cinnamon and cloves. Mound lamb attractively on a heated platter and pour sauce over it.
